description: A top-level server-only ?{} SQL block fires W-CG-001 (warning stream — suppressed from client output). Proves the adapter unions codes across result.warnings; ALSO exercises the schema's per-code `severity` (W-CG-001=warning vs W-SQL-ROW-UNTYPED=info, the §34 partition) and `notCodePrefixes` (no E-FORMFOR-*/E-TABLEFOR-* family fires).
